creator: paul@gromit.dlib.vt.edu
text:
This patch also works for me on 10.3-RELEASE-p24 and fixes the problem mentioned in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=226625

(The recent update to www/nginx bumped its version of Passenger to 5.2.1 for the option to compile a Passenger module.  This puts the version out of step with the other Passenger support programs provided by www/rubygem-passenger.)
